ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Response is relevant and consistent with persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency effectively.
baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>The response is relevant but lacks contextual control and tuning to reflect the dynamic situation, slightly less natural in tone for an NPC.
"Response is contextually relevant but lacks natural urgency and persuasive appeal."
